conference.name: UBC Gaming Expo 2026 Pokémon Schedule
conference.subtitle: Welcome to our page for all things Pokémon!

events.title: Pokémon Standard Tournament
events.description: Pokémon trading card players will play in Best of One matches using their Standard-legal decks and the winner will receive an Ascended Heroes ETB.

events.title: "What's that Card?" Kahoot with Eric
events.description: Test your card recognition skills in this Kahoot featuring competitive-oriented cards! The winner will receive a pack, all participants will get a raffle entry and top 3 will be awarded an extra entry.
events.notes: No registration needed, Personal device required.

events.title: Pokémon Imitation contest with Mimi
events.description: Show off your best Pokémon impression in the Pokémon imitation contest! Step up and perform your best Pokémon cry, voice, or mannerism for the audience. Audience members will choose their favourite performances and the contestant with the most votes will be crowned the winner and receive a pack of Destined Rivals! All participants will get a raffle entry
events.notes: Register at the front desk inside the Pokémon room!

events.title: General Trivia Kahoot with Eric
events.description: Find out how much your knowledge of the Pokémon franchise stacks up against others in this general trivia Kahoot! Personal device required. The winner will receive a pack, all participants will get a raffle entry and top 3 will be awarded an extra entry.
events.notes: No registration needed, Personal device required.

events.title: Free Play Tables: Retro TCG Decks with Ryan
events.description: Try popular Pokemon TCG formats of the past with our retro gauntlets! We have decks from two popular retro formats, 2017 NAIC (PRC-GRI) and 2018 LAIC (SUM-LOT). Additional raffle entry rewarded for participation.

events.title: Free Play Tables: Learn to Play Pokécatch with Eric Jaiden and Hayden
events.description: Don't know how to play the TCG? 🙁 Come join us and try out exciting and easy to learn alternate format—same cards, different rules! 🤩  All participants will receive raffle entries 🎟️ to the Destined Rivals Packs giveaways!

events.title: Free Play Tables: Play Pokémon Cube with Jennifer and Ryan
events.description: Draft, build, and battle with your own deck from scratch in the cube format! Cards will be provided. Additional raffle entry rewarded for participation.
